title: ficus hirta subsp. dumosa
intro: Ficus hirta subsp. dumosa, also known as the 'Banyan Fig', is a species of fig tree that belongs to the family Moraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus hirta subsp. dumosa include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
